goal: Create permanent testing policy documentation and an execution trace for independent verification by a fast verifier subagent.
global_constraints: Do not change application code or AI contracts in this documentation task.
Do not make independent verification mandatory for every trivial change.
Update .desc.json and PROJECT_STRUCTURE.yaml after structural changes.
cross_cutting_acceptance: Testing policy explains unit, integration, e2e and contract checks.
Testing policy defines when a separate verifier subagent is recommended.
AGENTS.md contains the operational rule for agents.
Workflow reports document execution and verification.
